subject: Your shared prototype has new comments
preview: Three teammates replied to the onboarding review thread.
body_html: Open Figma to review the latest comments.

subject: Your Instagram Account Has Been Compromised - Act Now
preview: Unusual login from Moscow, Russia at 03:14 AM. If this was not you, secure your account now.
body_html:
Hi,

We detected a suspicious Instagram login from Moscow, Russia using a Windows device we do not recognize. If this was not you, secure your account immediately.

Secure My Account

This recovery session expires shortly for your protection.

subject: Updated invite: Security Benchmark Review
preview: The project review moved to 3:00 PM this afternoon.
